description_long: A disposable cup of ramen noodles is filled to the brim with thin, light brown noodles and garnished with small green herbs and bits of topping. The cup is made of white plastic with a ribbed upper section and a smooth lower body, featuring a red circular logo with Japanese text and the words 'Ramen Noodles' on one side. Two black-and-white chopsticks are inserted diagonally into the noodles, their tips resting inside the cup. The noodles are loosely arranged, with some strands and toppings visible above the rim. The overall appearance is clean and typical of instant ramen packaging, suitable for quick meals in urban environments. The cup is compact and portable, designed for single-serving use.
description: A white plastic ramen cup filled with noodles, topped with herbs and bits, and two black-and-white chopsticks inserted. The cup features a ribbed rim and a red logo on the side.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from a plain side, showing the ribbed rim, noodles, and chopsticks, with no visible logo.
description_view_1: This view reveals the red circular logo with Japanese text and 'Ramen Noodles' on the cup, along with the chopsticks and visible toppings.
description_view_2: The logo is partially visible, and the chopsticks are more centered, with noodles and toppings clearly displayed.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the opposite side of the logo, focusing on the noodles and chopsticks, with the ribbed rim prominent.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is a cylindrical, white plastic cup with a ribbed upper section and a smooth lower body. It features a red circular logo with Japanese text and 'Ramen Noodles' on one side. The rim is slightly flared and unadorned, giving it a utilitarian, disposable appearance.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are scattered across the surface of the noodles, with small green herbs and bits distributed evenly. There is no distinct pattern, and the toppings appear to be randomly placed for a casual, appetizing look.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are prominently displayed above the rim of the cup, with many strands exposed and only partially covered by toppings. They are not submerged, making them the most visible element.
attribute_broth_clarity: No visible broth is present; the noodles and toppings appear dry or only lightly moistened, with no clear or cloudy liquid seen. The surface is free of floating particles or oil.
attribute_utensil_presence: Two black-and-white chopsticks are present, inserted diagonally into the noodles and resting inside the cup. The chopsticks appear to be made of wood or plastic.
